name: Vegas Women In The Big Book
groupNotes:
ZOOM in to our Monday through Friday WOMEN'S Big Book study 5PM PST. 

Waiting Room enabled, voice verified female attendance.

name: Solution 62
groupNotes:
We are not saints, but we have a solution. Various AA meetings everyday. We have 1 hour meetings with 30 minutes of fellowship before and after meetings. The only requirement for membership is a desire to stop drinking.

8:30 am-10 am est and 8:30 pm-10 pm est Monday-Sunday
Men's meeting every Wednesday 6:30 PM-8:00 PM est.
Women’s meeting every Sunday 6:30 PM- 8:00 PM est
On-Line Meeting link above and on website

name: AA A New Beginning
notes:
We are an online community dedicated to recovery from alcoholism using the program of Alcoholics Anonymous. We believe in upholding the traditions of AA, and strive to help those who still suffer.
We have open chat, as well as open meeting of Alcoholics Anonymous and email meetings. Chat meetings take place at 9:00 PM EST.
Our primary purpose is to stay sober and help others to recover from alcoholism.

name: Life After 10 Tuesdays
notes:
Life After 10 meets every Tuesday at 6pm via Zoom. Before the stay at home mandate we met at Olive Lutheran Church, Ocean Park Blvd in Santa Monica
Format of the meeting is for the Speaker to read a paragraph in the Big Book of Alcoholics Anonymous and share for 15 minutes on what they read. Participants with 10 or more years can share for 3 minutes.. Birthday participants of any sobriety length can share for 3 minutes.
Deaf/Hard of Hearing Interpreter. This is a closed meeting to alcoholics, Men, Women, & Non-Binary.   Meeting ends with 3 minutes of meditation.

name: AA CUC del Valle
groupNotes:
Grupo CUC del Valle es un grupo tradicional cuyo único propósito es mantenernos sobrios y ayudar a otros alcohólicos a alcanzar el estado de sobriedad, tal como lo indica el enunciado de AA.
La sesión es abierta con 15 min de tribuna por participante.

Sesionamos todos los días.
Los jueves tenemos junta de estudio

name: Vaqueritos Virtual
notes:
Somos un grupo de A.A. que encontramos en las reuniones virtuales permanecer sobrios y unidos.
Grupo de habla hispana que compartimos nuestra experiencia, fortaleza y esperanza.
 
Reuniones de Lunes a domingo 8am y 8pm Tiempo del centro de México.
Reuniones de  8am a 9:30am y 8pm a 9:30pm los 7 días de la semana 
Agenda:
 
8am a 9:30am
lunes: Plenitud Digital 
martes: Texto Básico
miércoles: Lenguaje del corazón
jueves: Capacitación de Información al Publico
Viernes: Viviendo Sobrio
Sábado: 12 Tradiciones 
Domingo: Lo mejor de Bill
 
8pm a 9:30pm

martes:12 Doce pasos 
miércoles: Llegamos a creer 
Jueves: Texto Básico 
Viernes: Viviendo Sobrio
Sábado: 12 Tradiciones 
Domingo: 12 conceptos para el servicio mundial

name: Warner Springs AA Discussion
groupNotes:
Wednesday AA Open Discussion Meeting 6PM PST 


AA members to share experience strength and home. Leader picks a topic related to alcohol then shares and opens the meeting for discussion about the topic.  Every Wednesday at 6pm, we are a small back County group. 

Verification is required.  
We are trying to keep our meeting safe.  
Please email early at least 15 to 20 minutes before the meeting starts.  We ask for your patience.

Please make sure you mention in your email which meeting Passcode you are requesting as well as sending us your phone number for a return call for verification.  We will call back before the next meeting and give you the password verbally. 

Please make sure your first name appears in your video when you log on and contact the secretary/host via chat when you arrive to let him know you received password via phone from a member.
Sorry for this lengthy process.
Stay safe one day at a time.  

And please write/email Serenityinpines@gmail.com

name: Wednesday Night Candlelight
notes:
A Wednesday night participation meeting at 8:30pm PST. This is an open meeting that is based on a step of the week. The format is we have a leader that shares for 10 minutes on the step and he/she then picks members to share for three minutes, sharing continues for the remainder of the meeting. The meeting is 1 hour long, every Wednesday 8:30pm PST.

https://us02web.zoom.us/j/726415314

 
Email: candlelightaajp@gmail.com

Public Phone Number, if any: +16699009128,,726415314# US (San Jose)
Meeting Access Code, if any: 726415314

Somos un grupo de A.A. que encontramos en las reuniones virtuales permanecer sobrios y unidos.
Grupo de habla hispana que compartimos nuestra experiencia, fortaleza y esperanza.
 
Reuniones de Lunes a domingo 8am y 8pm Tiempo del centro de México.
Reuniones de  8am a 9:30am y 8pm a 9:30pm los 7 días de la semana 
Agenda:
 
8am a 9:30am
lunes: Plenitud Digital 
martes: Texto Básico
miércoles: Lenguaje del corazón
jueves: Capacitación de Información al Publico
Viernes: Viviendo Sobrio
Sábado: 12 Tradiciones 
Domingo: Lo mejor de Bill
 
8pm a 9:30pm
lunes: Plenitud Digital
martes:12 Doce pasos 
miércoles: Llegamos a creer 
Jueves: Texto Básico 
Viernes: Viviendo Sobrio
Sábado: 12 Tradiciones 
Domingo: 12 conceptos para el servicio mundial

name: Global Men's Meditation
groupNotes:
This a meditation meeting which has a different form of meditation every day of the week. 
It meets from 8:30am to 9:30am PST, 11:30am EST

Public Email Contact: kkcbmeetings@gmail.com

name: Sunday's Best
notes: A meeting to help recover from alcohol - 1pm every Sunday. We open at 12:45pm

name: Serenity Sundays
groupNotes:
Serenity Sunday’s is a women’s topic discussion group to share our experience, strength, and hope surrounding various topics. We use the Zoom app to run this meeting. 

One tap mobile - click on PHONE above
Find your local number: https://us02web.zoom.us/u/kdoQjGuWH4

name: Vegas High Noon Gamble
groupNotes: Step in to Las Vegas and pick a number from some of our favorite Recovery Sayings books or draw a card from The Big Book Deck for your turn at collecting a winning hand of Experience, Strength and Hope every afternoon!

name: Solution 62
groupNotes:
We are not saints, but we have a solution. Various AA meetings everyday. We have 1 hour meetings with 30 minutes of fellowship before and after meetings. The only requirement for membership is a desire to stop drinking.

8:30 am-10 am est and 8:30 pm-10 pm est Monday-Sunday
Men's meeting every Wednesday 6:30 PM-8:00 PM est.
Women’s meeting every Sunday 6:30 PM- 8:00 PM est
On-Line Meeting link above and on website

name: 30 at night
groupNotes:
A daily Telephone meeting till Covid -19 is done

From: 6:45pm - 6:50pm ET each night before the meeting to welcome new folks.

name: Vegas Drama Queens
notes: ZOOM into our daily women's meeting, format varies daily

name: Solution 62
groupNotes:
We are not saints, but we have a solution. Various AA meetings everyday. We have 1 hour meetings with 30 minutes of fellowship before and after meetings. The only requirement for membership is a desire to stop drinking.

8:30 am-10 am est and 8:30 pm-10 pm est Monday-Sunday
Men's meeting every Wednesday 6:30 PM-8:00 PM est.
Women’s meeting every Sunday 6:30 PM- 8:00 PM est
On-Line Meeting link above and on website

name: AA A New Beginning
notes:
We are an online community dedicated to recovery from alcoholism using the program of Alcoholics Anonymous. We believe in upholding the traditions of AA, and strive to help those who still suffer.
We have open chat, as well as open meeting of Alcoholics Anonymous and email meetings. Chat meetings take place at 9:00 PM EST.
Our primary purpose is to stay sober and help others to recover from alcoholism.

name: AA CUC del Valle
groupNotes:
Grupo CUC del Valle es un grupo tradicional cuyo único propósito es mantenernos sobrios y ayudar a otros alcohólicos a alcanzar el estado de sobriedad, tal como lo indica el enunciado de AA.
La sesión es abierta con 15 min de tribuna por participante.

Sesionamos todos los días.
Los jueves tenemos junta de estudio

name: Vegas Quarantined
notes:
ZOOM in to our VEGAS Quarantined! meeting 7 days a week at
8:30PM PST. Wednesday As Bill Sees It, Friday Big Book Study, Sunday
Speaker Meeting, and the rotating hosts pull topics from our regulars
and visitors from around the world the rest of the nights.

name: Vegas PANDEMIC! at the disco
notes:
ZOOM into our DAILY MIDNIGHT (PST) meeting in LAS VEGAS! Topic discussions
rotating through daily reflections, burning desires and various meditations.

name: Better with Age
groupNotes:
This is an open AA meeting oriented toward Older Adult (55+) issues, but all ages are welcomed.
Format: Open discussion based on the day’s reading from Daily Reflections.

This is a recurring meeting on- 
Mondays 10:30 - 11:30 AM EST
Thursdays 2:00 - 3:00 PM EST
Saturdays 10:30 - 11:30AM EST 

Questions?  Please contact 2020betterwithage@gmail.com

name: Vegas Daily Reflections
groupNotes: This is a Monday through Saturday meeting based in Las Vegas, NV. Topic is the Daily Reflection. Join our lively discussion, with members welcomed from all coffee pots in the world!

name: Just for Today
groupNotes: Meeting Description: Just For Today.  A meeting based on AA Thought for the day, AA Meditation for the day to close with AA prayer for the day.

groupNotes:
